section_id: 2002 POEA Rules - Migrant Worker Education Role
title: Role of the Administration in Migrant Worker Education
content: In accordance with the policy of full disclosure, the Administration shall provide a comprehensive and integrated education program on overseas employment in all stages of recruitment and employment in partnership with other relevant organizations and government entities.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
